hero.title: AI for Painters
hero.description: Your AI virtual assistant helps painters capture quote requests, manage bookings, answer client calls after hours, and follow up on jobs so you can focus on painting, not paperwork.

stats.label: More quote requests captured with 24/7 call answering.
Reduction in missed calls during jobs and after hours.
Higher job conversion with fast, professional follow-ups.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Quote Request Again
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we understand that painting businesses live and die by their quote pipeline. Our AI Virtual Receptionist answers every call professionally capturing job details, property size, and contact information while you're on-site with a brush in hand.

blocks.heading: Handle Calls While You're On the Tools
blocks.description: Your AI Receptionist manages incoming calls, client enquiries, and booking requests while you're working. It can answer questions like 'Do you do interior and exterior?' or 'Can I book a free quote?' and schedule appointments directly into your calendar.

blocks.heading: Professional First Impressions, Every Time
blocks.description: Whether you're painting a house in the suburbs or managing a commercial site, your AI Receptionist ensures every potential client gets a prompt, professional response day or night. Never lose a job to a competitor just because you couldn't answer the phone.

keyBenefits.title: Key Benefits
keyBenefits.subtitle: Grow your painting business with intelligent automation that captures more leads, books more jobs, and keeps clients happy.

cards.title: 24/7 Quote Capture
cards.description: Capture every quote request—even after hours and weekends when clients call.

cards.title: Automated Scheduling
cards.description: Book on-site quote visits and follow-up calls automatically without lifting a finger.

cards.title: Professional Image
cards.description: Sound like a larger, established painting company on every single call.

cards.title: Never Miss a Job
cards.description: Stop losing work to competitors just because you were on a ladder when the phone rang.

cards.title: Customised for Painting
cards.description: Train your AI on your specific services—interior, exterior, residential, commercial, or colour consulting.

cards.title: Polite Client Care
cards.description: Provide immediate response and updates to build client satisfaction and trust.

cards.title: Time-Saving Booking
cards.description: AI handles booking administrative work, letting you focus on finishing projects on-site.

cards.title: Smart Follow-Ups
cards.description: Follow up automatically on quotes sent to turn enquiries into confirmed paint jobs.

cards.title: Centralised Client Records
cards.description: Easily access past estimates, address details, and job descriptions in one secure dashboard.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Painters Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: From sole traders and small crews to larger commercial painting businesses, our AI Receptionist integrates seamlessly with your scheduling and quoting systems. It ensures every call is answered professionally and every job opportunity is captured. Your AI Receptionist can be trained to your specific services - interior, exterior, residential, commercial, colour consulting - and reflects your brand in every interaction. Whether you're on a ladder or managing multiple sites, let AI handle the phones so you can focus on delivering quality paintwork.

card.heading: Capture Every Quote Request Automatically
card.description: When a client calls, your AI Receptionist gathers all the details you need—property address, job type, size estimate, preferred timeline—and books the quote visit directly into your calendar. No back and forth, no missed calls, no lost jobs. All enquiry details are recorded and available whenever you need them.

items.title: Quote Request Capture
items.description: Gather job details—property type, size, interior/exterior, preferred timeline—and book the quote visit.

items.title: Job Scheduling
items.description: Coordinate start dates, access arrangements, and prep requirements directly with clients.

items.title: After-Hours Answering
items.description: Answer calls at night and on weekends when you're offline, so no job opportunity slips through.

items.title: Client Follow-Up
items.description: Automatically follow up on quotes sent, reminding clients and nudging them to confirm the job.

items.title: AI Assistant
items.description: Answer common questions like 'Do you do commercial jobs?' or 'What paint brands do you use?'

cta.note: Get your AI Virtual Receptionist set up in under 5 minutes.

items.title: Zero Missed Calls

items.title: Faster Booking Process
items.description: Clients can book a quote visit in minutes without back-and-forth phone calls.

summary.title: Quote Request & Job Booking
summary.description: A homeowner calls after hours asking about exterior painting. Your AI receptionist answers, captures the property details, and books a free quote inspection for the following morning.

steps.title: Instant Confirmation
steps.description: Client receives an automatic confirmation with the quote visit time and your contact details.

steps.title: Job Details Captured
steps.description: Property address, size estimate, paint preferences, and urgency all recorded before you arrive.

steps.title: Follow-Up Automated
steps.description: After the quote is sent, a follow-up message goes out automatically if there's no response in 48 hours.

steps.title: Booking Reminders
steps.description: Client receives reminders before the quote visit so no-shows are minimised and your time is protected.
